subject: WM-0162 review: changes_requested
body: High: PR-1 projection requirements are not representable by the current RenderSnapshot/UiDelta public schema, while WM-0164/WM-0165 forbid sim-protocol/schema changes; assign a reviewed protocol decision/task and file ownership or narrow the contract. High: WM-0165 depends only on WM-0163, but its acceptance requires the WM-0164 Worker scheduler and its required checks name the WM-0164-created game-session-worker.test.ts, so the claimed parallel width-2 DAG is not executable. Keep WM-0163..0166 proposed and revise dependencies/gates.
